en: Concerning the Ammonites.Thus says the LORD: "Has Israel no sons? Has he no heir? Why then has Milcom dispossessed Gad, and his people settled in its cities?
zh: 論到亞捫， 耶和華這樣說： “以色列沒有子孫嗎？ 沒有後嗣嗎？ 為甚麼米勒公竟承受了迦得為業呢？ 它的人民為甚麼住在迦得的城市裡呢？

en: Therefore, behold, the days are coming, declares the LORD, when I will cause the battle cry to be heard against Rabbah of the Ammonites; it shall become a desolate mound, and its villages shall be burned with fire; then Israel shall dispossess those who dispossessed him, says the LORD.
zh: 因此，看哪！日子快到 ， 我必使戰爭的吶喊聲響起， 有敵人來攻擊亞捫的拉巴； 拉巴必成為一片廢墟， 屬它的鄉鎮 必被火焚燒。 那時以色列人必從侵略他們的人的手中收回土地。” 這是耶和華說的。

en: "Wail, O Heshbon, for Ai is laid waste! Cry out, O daughters of Rabbah! put on sackcloth, lament, and run to and fro among the hedges! For Milcom shall go into exile, with his priests and his officials.
zh: “希實本哪，你要哀號！因為艾城已被毀滅。 拉巴的居民 ，你們要呼喊， 要腰束麻布，要哀哭， 要在城牆內跑來跑去。 因為米勒公，以及事奉它的祭司和領袖， 都必一同被擄去。

en: Why do you boast of your valleys, O faithless daughter, who trusted in her treasures, saying, 'Who will come against me?'
zh: 背道的居民 哪！ 你們為甚麼因有山谷， 就是你們那肥沃的山谷而誇口呢？ 你們十分倚靠自己的財寶，說： ‘有誰敢來攻擊我們呢？’

en: Behold, I will bring terror upon you, declares the Lord GOD of hosts, from all who are around you, and you shall be driven out, every man straight before him, with none to gather the fugitives.
zh: 看哪！我必使你們因四圍的列國而恐慌， 這是主萬軍之耶和華的宣告； 你們必被趕逐，各自逃命， 沒有人把四散奔逃的人聚集起來。

en: "But afterward I will restore the fortunes of the Ammonites, declares the LORD."
zh: 但我日後必使被擄的亞捫人歸回。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Concerning Edom. Thus says the LORD of hosts: "Is wisdom no more in Teman? Has counsel perished from the prudent? Has their wisdom vanished?
zh: 論到以東， 萬軍之耶和華這樣說： “提幔再沒有智慧嗎？ 聰明人已經計窮才盡嗎？ 他們的智慧都消失了嗎？

en: Flee, turn back, dwell in the depths, O inhabitants of Dedan! For I will bring the calamity of Esau upon him, the time when I punish him.
zh: 底但的居民哪！ 你們要轉身逃跑，藏在隱蔽的地方， 因為我懲罰以掃的時候， 必使災禍臨到他身上。

en: If grape-gatherers came to you, would they not leave gleanings? If thieves came by night, would they not destroy only enough for themselves?
zh: 收取葡萄的若來到你那裡， 豈不剩下一些葡萄嗎？ 盜賊若在夜間來到你那裡， 豈不是只偷他們所要的嗎 ？

en: But I have stripped Esau bare; I have uncovered his hiding places, and he is not able to conceal himself. His children are destroyed, and his brothers, and his neighbors; and he is no more.
zh: 但是我要使以掃赤裸， 揭露他藏匿的地方， 以致他不能隱藏。 他的後裔、他的兄弟和他的鄰居都必滅亡，

en: Leave your fatherless children; I will keep them alive; and let your widows trust in me."
zh: 沒有人會說：‘你撇下你的孤兒， 我必使他們存活； 你的寡婦可以倚靠我。’”

en: For thus says the LORD: "If those who did not deserve to drink the cup must drink it, will you go unpunished? You shall not go unpunished, but you must drink.
zh: 耶和華這樣說：“看哪！原不該喝那杯的，尚且一定要喝，難道你可以完全免受刑罰嗎？你必不能免受刑罰，你一定要喝那杯。

en: For I have sworn by myself, declares the LORD, that Bozrah shall become a horror, a taunt, a waste, and a curse, and all her cities shall be perpetual wastes."
zh: 因為我曾指著自己起誓，波斯拉必成為令人驚駭、被人羞辱和咒詛的對象；它必變成荒野，它一切的城鎮都必永遠變成荒場。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: I have heard a message from the LORD, and an envoy has been sent among the nations: "Gather yourselves together and come against her, and rise up for battle!
zh: 我從耶和華那裡聽見了一個信息， 有一位使者被派往列國去，說： “你們要聚集去攻擊以東， 要起來爭戰！”

en: For behold, I will make you small among the nations, despised among mankind.
zh: “看哪！我必使你在列國中成為弱小的， 在世人中被藐視。

en: The horror you inspire has deceived you, and the pride of your heart, you who live in the clefts of the rock, who hold the height of the hill. Though you make your nest as high as the eagle's, I will bring you down from there, declares the LORD.
zh: 你那令人戰慄的威風， 你心中的傲氣欺騙了你； 你這住在巖石的隱密處， 雄據山嶺高處的啊！ 你雖如鷹在高處搭窩， 我也必把你從那裡拉下來。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "Edom shall become a horror. Everyone who passes by it will be horrified and will hiss because of all its disasters.
zh: “以東必成為令人驚駭的地方；每一個經過那裡的，都必因這地所遭受的一切創傷而驚駭，並且嗤笑它。

en: As when Sodom and Gomorrah and their neighboring cities were overthrown, says the LORD, no man shall dwell there, no man shall sojourn in her.
zh: 以東必傾覆，像所多瑪、蛾摩拉，和它們的城鎮一樣 ，必沒有人住在那裡，也必沒有人在那裡寄居。

en: Behold, like a lion coming up from the jungle of the Jordan against a perennial pasture, I will suddenly make him run away from her. And I will appoint over her whomever I choose. For who is like me? Who will summon me? What shepherd can stand before me?
zh: 看哪！獅子怎樣從約旦河邊的叢林走上來，攻擊常綠的牧場，照樣，我必在眨眼之間把以東趕走，使它離開這地；誰蒙揀選，我就派誰治理這地。誰能和我相比呢？誰可以把我傳來審訊呢？哪一個牧人能在我面前站立得住呢？”

en: Therefore hear the plan that the LORD has made against Edom and the purposes that he has formed against the inhabitants of Teman: Even the little ones of the flock shall be dragged away. Surely their fold shall be appalled at their fate.
zh: 因此，你們要聽耶和華籌謀對付以東的計劃，和他為了提幔的居民所定下的策略。他們羊群中最小的也必被拉去，他們的牧場也必因臨到它們的災禍而荒廢。

en: At the sound of their fall the earth shall tremble; the sound of their cry shall be heard at the Red Sea.
zh: 因他們倒下的響聲，地就震動；並且有哀叫的聲音，在紅海那裡也聽得到。

en: Behold, one shall mount up and fly swiftly like an eagle and spread his wings against Bozrah, and the heart of the warriors of Edom shall be in that day like the heart of a woman in her birth pains."
zh: 看哪！必有一人像大鷹飛撲而來，展開翅膀攻擊波斯拉；在那日，以東勇士的心必驚慌，像臨產婦人的心一樣。

en: Concerning Damascus: "Hamath and Arpad are confounded, for they have heard bad news; they melt in fear, they are troubled like the sea that cannot be quiet.
zh: 論到大馬士革，耶和華說： “哈馬和亞珥拔紛亂不安， 因為他們聽到了壞消息； 他們的心融化，焦慮慌張， 像不能平靜的海洋。

en: Damascus has become feeble, she turned to flee, and panic seized her; anguish and sorrows have taken hold of her, as of a woman in labor.
zh: 大馬士革失去勇氣，轉身逃跑； 但恐慌抓住它， 憂慮痛苦把它捉住， 像正在生產的婦人的痛苦一樣。

en: How is the famous city not forsaken, the city of my joy?
zh: 著名的城市， 我所歡喜的市鎮， 怎麼竟被撇棄呢！

en: Therefore her young men shall fall in her squares, and all her soldiers shall be destroyed in that day, declares the LORD of hosts.
zh: 它的年輕人必仆倒在它的街道上， 到那日，所有的戰士都必被消滅。” 這是萬軍之耶和華的宣告。

en: And I will kindle a fire in the wall of Damascus, and it shall devour the strongholds of Ben-hadad."
zh: “我要焚燒大馬士革的城牆， 燒毀便．哈達的堡壘。”

en: Concerning Kedar and the kingdoms of Hazor that Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon struck down. Thus says the LORD: "Rise up, advance against Kedar! Destroy the people of the east!
zh: 論到巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒所擊敗的基達，以及夏瑣諸國，耶和華這樣說： “起來，上去攻擊基達， 消滅東方人！

en: Their tents and their flocks shall be taken, their curtains and all their goods; their camels shall be led away from them, and men shall cry to them: 'Terror on every side!'
zh: 奪去他們的帳棚和羊群， 帶走他們的幔子、一切器具和駱駝； 人必向他們呼叫： ‘四圍都是驚慌。’

en: Flee, wander far away, dwell in the depths, O inhabitants of Hazor! declares the LORD. For Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon has made a plan against you and formed a purpose against you.
zh: 夏瑣的居民哪！你們要逃跑， 快快逃命，藏在隱蔽的地方， 因為巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒籌謀計劃對付你們， 定下策略攻擊你們。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "Rise up, advance against a nation at ease, that dwells securely, declares the LORD, that has no gates or bars, that dwells alone.
zh: “起來！上去攻打那安逸無慮的國家 ； 這國沒有城門，也沒有門閂； 他們是獨自居住的。

en: Their camels shall become plunder, their herds of livestock a spoil. I will scatter to every wind those who cut the corners of their hair, and I will bring their calamity from every side of them, declares the LORD.
zh: 他們的駱駝必成為掠物， 他們無數的牲畜必成為擄物。 我必把那些剃除了鬢髮的人分散到四方去， 我必使災禍從四面八方臨到他們。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Hazor shall become a haunt of jackals, an everlasting waste; no man shall dwell there; no man shall sojourn in her."
zh: “夏瑣必成為野狗的巢穴， 永遠荒涼； 必沒有人住在那裡， 也必沒有人在那裡寄居。”

en: The word of the LORD that came to Jeremiah the prophet concerning Elam, in the beginning of the reign of Zedekiah king of Judah.
zh: 猶大王西底家開始執政的時候，耶和華論到以攔的話臨到耶利米先知，說：

en: Thus says the LORD of hosts: "Behold, I will break the bow of Elam, the mainstay of their might.
zh: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說： 看哪！我要折斷以攔的弓， 就是他們戰鬥力強的武器。

en: And I will bring upon Elam the four winds from the four quarters of heaven. And I will scatter them to all those winds, and there shall be no nation to which those driven out of Elam shall not come.
zh: 我要使四風從天的四邊颳到以攔身上， 把他們分散到四方， 以致沒有一個國家沒有以攔難民的蹤跡。

en: I will terrify Elam before their enemies and before those who seek their life. I will bring disaster upon them, my fierce anger, declares the LORD. I will send the sword after them, until I have consumed them,
zh: 我必使以攔人在他們的仇敵面前驚慌， 在尋索他們性命的人面前恐懼； 我必使災禍，就是我的烈怒，臨到他們身上； 我必差遣刀劍追趕他們， 直到把他們滅絕。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: and I will set my throne in Elam and destroy their king and officials, declares the LORD.
zh: “我必在以攔設立我的寶座， 除滅那裡的君王和領袖 。

en: "But in the latter days I will restore the fortunes of Elam, declares the LORD."
zh: 但日後我必使被擄的以攔人歸回。” 這是耶和華的宣告。
